text: Pilot Aimparency for Wilde Möhre festival planning
description: Use Aimparency to model a real slice of Wilde Möhre festival planning as a free pilot. First agree with the relevant people on one bounded workflow where explicit aims and dependencies have non-zero value, then model it, use it during actual planning, collect concrete feedback, and document evidence for a case study. Success means real participants use or review the model and identify measurable value, friction, or a credible paid follow-up. Felix can introduce and facilitate this through his work at the festival.

status.comment: Pilot proposal, bounded workflow options, evidence plan, and internal ask are ready. Felix still needs to secure permission, select the workflow, and identify its owner.

reflection: Prepared meta/applications/funding-15k-2026/wilde-moehre-pilot.md: a four-week free pilot proposal, three bounded workflow candidates, evidence measures, privacy/permission decisions, stop conditions, an internal ask, and a non-coercive commercial follow-up. This removes preparation work while leaving institutional approval and workflow selection to Felix.
